_meta.generated_note: Consolidated source map of every Gotcha Force (GG4E/NTSC-U) game-logic function the project's decompilation research has assigned a concrete role. Built by cross-referencing behavior-notes.md sections (a)-(bb), attack-mechanics-findings.md / -ledger.json, and state-anim-dispatch-802d3570.json against ghidra-export/_index.tsv for canonical name+chunk. One entry per address (deduped). Only functions with an identifiable game-logic role are included; addresses cited only in passing (constants, data-table addresses, mid-function instruction PCs, engine calls named without a role) were skipped -- see cited_addresses_skipped_roleless.

confidence_legend.DERIVED_ROM: role read directly from decompiled C / raw-ROM data (matches the notebook's DERIVED tier)
confidence_legend.INFERRED: role inferred from field reuse / call shape / handler routing / confirmed asset-container decode, not a direct gameplay-code read
confidence_legend.NAMED_ONLY: cited in prose but NOT a function entry in _index.tsv (mid-function PC, differently-attributed symbol, or engine/library symbol named without a Gotcha-Force gameplay role) -- name is the prose/engine-map name

_meta.cited_addresses_skipped_roleless: ~40 cited 0x8xxxxxxx tokens resolve to data/constant addresses (SDA floats e.g. 0x80437448, dispatch/lookup-table bases e.g. 0x802d3570 / 0x802f2e28 / 0x802d46e0 / 0x802c4760, mid-function instruction PCs e.g. 0x80055c00 / 0x8005c7d8 / 0x8005d4b0) rather than role-bearing function entries; those are referenced inside the role text of the owning function rather than given their own entry. A handful of camera sub-thunks (0x8000d5a0/d5f4/d600/d60c/d644) and boundary markers were also left out as roleless.

functions.name: zz_000bda4_
functions.role: per-frame camera update: loops 12 camera objects (0x803c73b0 stride 0x3E4), pairs each with its target actor via cam[0x2E5], dispatches per-mode policy

functions.role: player->slot resolver: reads PTR_DAT_80433934[player+0xc0] to get player 0's active-borg slot

functions.name: FUN_8000c660
functions.role: camera mode-0 init handler (also inits actor+0x3F1, +0x5B0 behind-angle)

functions.name: FUN_8000c918
functions.role: camera mode-1 handler: indexes goal-eye sub-table 0x802c3894 by actor+0x3F1

functions.name: FUN_8000c988
functions.role: camera mode-2 approach: spiral-in/orbit (dist>80?dist*0.9, trail yaw +0x200/frame, eyeY +4/frame)

functions.name: FUN_8000cb8c
functions.role: camera mode-1 gameplay dispatcher (state machine over cam+0x2E6)

functions.name: FUN_8000cdc0
functions.role: camera primary no-lock follow (mode-1 state 2): the main gameplay goal-eye policy

functions.name: FUN_8000cf28
functions.role: camera lock-on follow (state 3): rotates trail toward lock target actor+0x50C

functions.name: FUN_8000d11c
functions.role: camera lock/unlock transition (distance-scaled blend weights)

functions.name: FUN_8000d318
functions.role: camera actor+0x7C9 special (timered, decays back to state 2)

functions.name: FUN_8000fc2c
functions.role: shared camera goal-eye math (height ease, interest, distance-band clamp)

functions.name: FUN_8000fffc
functions.role: camera distance re-clamp to per-borg band

functions.name: FUN_800101c8
functions.role: camera correctives: recomputes dist/pitch/heading, publishes actor+0x5B0 behind-angle

functions.name: PlatAudio::IsSFXPlaying(unsigned
functions.role: platform SFX-playing query (engine audio)

functions.name: zz_00297c8_
functions.role: battle-end judge: computes winner mask PTR_DAT_80433934[0x1f] (bit0/bit1 side win, 4=timeout draw), per-side result flags

functions.name: zz_0029b58_
functions.role: battle timer countdown: decrements +0x4c only when battle-state[0x45]==4 AND freeze-flag[0x50]==0

functions.name: battle_frame_target_action_dispatch
functions.role: per-frame target/effect/action dispatch: resets per-slot target globals, pairwise push-apart weighting, vampire-lifesteal HP apply, nurse-heal apply

functions.name: collision_hit_pair_pass_active_vs_borgs
functions.role: generic collision pass: active-object vs borg-list pairing; collision gate (attackerRec.flagsB&0x4000)==0 || (targetRec.flagsB&0x2000)!=0

functions.name: collision_hit_pair_pass_active_vs_secondary
functions.role: generic collision pass: active-object vs secondary-object list pairing (owner/team/flag gates, no solidity flag)

functions.name: resolve_hitbox_target_effects_and_damage
functions.role: hit resolution: computes raw damage (type-mismatch quarter at +0x88), applies HP subtract, sets +0x684/688/68c 60-frame reaction timers, damage accumulators +0x41c/+0x42c

functions.name: zz_002f8dc_
functions.role: kill-event accounting: subtracts victim cost from side energy, decrements side count, records last-kill pointers, bumps kill/loss counters and team score

functions.name: zz_00300bc_
functions.role: knockback DIRECTION computer: 5 authored vector-source modes -> yaw/pitch (BAM16) written to defender +0x284/+0x282, plus per-move angle trim

functions.name: FUN_8003a4b8
functions.role: hitbox shape-kind evaluator table entry 0 (PTR_FUN_802da740[0]): simple point/capsule geometry

functions.name: FUN_8003ca48
functions.role: hitbox shape-kind evaluator table entry 11: proximity sphere with squared-distance AOE falloff (ICBM/walking-bomb detonation candidate)

functions.name: zz_003cd5c_
functions.role: base-damage formula: 18-stage pipeline from move power through stat/rank/HP-ratio/type-matrix/handicap/combo-falloff/friendly-fire; all tables extracted

functions.role: borg-pointer store: writes each active borg pointer into the 6-entry actor array 0x803C4E84, records slot at borg+0x3e4 (stride 0x1e00)

functions.role: Power Burst consume: requires +0x6fb!=0, attempts pair-match via zz_005b678_ (pair table 0x802d352c), sets +0x6fc=1 (2x out / 0.5x in) and +0x6fa=1
